title: Moving
overview: The invincible hitman, Fable, is ordered by the boss to live an ordinary life in Osaka for a year.

title: A Wonderful Night
overview: Akira and Yoko start their new life in Osaka, but trouble always seems to find them.

title: Tag
overview: Akira runs the risk of disobeying orders while minding his own business.

title: Chatting About Life
overview: Sparks fly between Akira, who wants to live in peace, and Ebihara, who wants the hitman out.

title: You Listening to Me?!
overview: In his quest to live an ordinary life, Akira begins the seemingly impossible task of finding a job.

title: Prison Release Jamboree
overview: Kojima becomes increasingly resentful at changes to the Maguro Group while he was in prison.

title: Realist
overview: With growing frustration, Kojima takes advantage of Ebihara's absence to make his move.

title: Because I'm...You know!
overview: Yoko sets her sights on a playboy womanizer who shows up at the bar where she hangs out.

title: You Mean a Hitman...?
overview: As Kojima's rampage escalates, Ebihara tries to get Akira to keep an eye on him.

title: The Phantom of the Balcony
overview: When Akira finds out that Misaki is in trouble, he goes into action to get her out of it.

title: The Fated Day
overview: Akira, Yoko, Kojima, and Sunagawa all prepare for what will be an explosive encounter.

title: There's Always Someone Better
overview: Hindered by his order not to kill, Akira still puts his rescue plan into motion.

title: Aniki...Aniki...
overview: Akira returns with Kojima, but now Ebihara faces a hard decision to keep the peace of the Group.

title: I Love You, Nii-san!
overview: Akira lets Kuroshio, who knows the truth about Fable, tag along for a two-night survival adventure.

title: Survival Traning?
overview: Akira and Kuroshio's survival adventure in the mountains drives Kuroshio to the edge of sanity.

title: Mountaineer Man
overview: One battleground, the woods, the other, a bar. Both will echo with sounds of fierce combat tonight.

title: Rei Utsubo
overview: From a Taihei detective agency, a dark force is at work, disturbing Akira's peaceful life.

title: Cheerio
overview: Utsubo and his associates approach Misaki as they proceed with their nefarious plans.

title: Lies and Falsehoods
overview: Akira finds out a surprising fact during a delivery, and Utsubo and his crew make their next move.

title: 24 Hours
overview: Utsubo exposes Kainuma's stalking, causing Kainuma to turn his ire on Misaki.

title: The ABCs of Villainy
overview: After discovering who Fable is, Utsubo begins working out a plan to kill Akira.

title: Doorstep Man
overview: Utsubo and Suzuki put into motion their carefully laid plans to kill Fable, their foe.

title: Horn
overview: Akira proves harder than expected to kill, and Utsubo runs into trouble preparing the next trap.

title: Starry Sky Lullaby
overview: Suzuki and Akira work desperately to save Hinako, and Utsubo puts his final plan into action.

title: Imagination Man
overview: Isaki arranges for a getaway car but runs into a snag. Otherwise, life goes on for everyone else.
